# TOOLS.md — {{AGENT_NAME}}
# Available Tools & Usage Patterns
# Client: {{CLIENT_NAME}} | Generated by VELA installer — {{INSTALL_DATE}}

## Gmail (gog-wrapper)

```bash
# Read inbox
gog-wrapper gmail search "is:unread is:important" -a {{CLIENT_EMAIL_PRIMARY}}
gog-wrapper gmail search "is:unread" -a {{CLIENT_EMAIL_PRIMARY}} --limit 20

# Send (always from CoS email, CC primary)
gog-wrapper gmail send -a {{CLIENT_EMAIL_COS}} \
  --to <recipient> \
  --subject "<subject>" \
  --body "<body>"
```

**Rule:** Draft → show {{CLIENT_NAME}} → get approval → send. Never skip.

## Calendar (gog-wrapper)

```bash
gog-wrapper calendar list -a {{CLIENT_EMAIL_PRIMARY}} --today
gog-wrapper calendar list -a {{CLIENT_EMAIL_PRIMARY}} --days 7
```

## Telegram (direct delivery)

```bash
# DM to {{CLIENT_NAME}}
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot{{TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}}/sendMessage" \
  -d "chat_id={{TELEGRAM_USER_ID}}" \
  --data-urlencode "text=MESSAGE"

# Post to agent topic
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot{{TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}}/sendMessage" \
  -d "chat_id={{TELEGRAM_GROUP_ID}}" \
  -d "message_thread_id=THREAD_ID" \
  --data-urlencode "text=FULL_OUTPUT"
```

Thread IDs: analyst→2, researcher→3, marketing→4, pm→5, legal→6, archive→7

## Agent Spawning

```bash
# Spawn specialist
openclaw agent --agent analyst --message "<task>" --local

# Check on specialist
openclaw agent --agent cos --message "<summary from specialist>" --local
```

## File System

```bash
# Hannah's workspace
~/.openclaw/workspace-cos/

# Logs
~/.openclaw/logs/

# Scripts
~/.openclaw/scripts/
```

## Cost Check

```bash
python3 ~/.openclaw/scripts/cost_alert.py --report-only
```

## License Check

```bash
python3 ~/.openclaw/scripts/license_check.py
cat ~/.openclaw/.vela_tier
```
